title: stachys arrecta
intro: Stachys arrecta, also known as upright betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stachys arrecta include treating headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as soothing sore muscles and reducing anxiety. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
